clusters.justification: Represents the overarching functional axis of emotional, aversive, and autonomic processing that typically maps onto salience and amygdala-centric limbic circuitry.
Captures the computational and motivational axis underlying reward processing, incentive-based decision-making, and reinforcement governed by striatal and ventromedial prefrontal systems.
Encompasses both internally-directed subjective abstraction and externally-directed interpersonal inference which robustly co-activate within the default mode architecture.
